repo_policy_snapshot.ai_policy_summary: The repository asks contributors to open an issue before non-trivial fixes, add focused tests, and follow the normal fork and pull-request workflow. Issue #1509 satisfies the issue-first requirement. No AI-assistance prohibition, CLA, or DCO requirement was found in the inspected instructions.
